title: SDK Error Classes
description: Error classes thrown by the jambonz WebRTC client SDK

JambonzError.description: Base error class for all SDK errors. Extends Error.

RegistrationError.description: Thrown when SIP registration fails (wrong credentials, SBC unreachable, etc.). Extends JambonzError.

CallError.description: Thrown when a call operation fails. Extends JambonzError.

ConnectionError.description: Thrown when the WebSocket connection to the SBC fails. Extends JambonzError.
